name: Onward and Upward
location_str: Orbital Launch Pad @ Andøya Spaceport, NOR
description: Second test flight of the Isar Spectrum launch vehicle. This launch will carry 5 cubesats and 1 non-separable experiment as part of European Space Agency (ESA)'s “Boost!” program:  * CyBEEsat (TU Berlin) * TriSat-S (University of Maribor) * Platform 6 (EnduroSat) * FramSat-1 (NTNU) * SpaceTeamSat1 (TU Wien Space Team) * Let It Go (Dcubed, non-separable experiment)
rocket_fact: Most rockets are painted white to reflect sunlight and keep the super-chilled cryogenic fuel from boiling off.
